TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Nanum Nanum(nanom) hananay i caay kasasawaden tu remiremiad anu a waay ku nanum i caay ka kapah kunipalumaan nu mawmahay caay ku sasawaden numaudipay a maamaan i ni sangan nu wama i kakarayan Aray koliyol no nanum Nanom nika koliyol o nanom i fafaed ato la'eno no cikiw malalinalinah. kalaliyol no nanom, pakaynien no nanom malalood, maloso'ay, malarahod masasiroma kaira i masasiromaay a niyaro'. Talacowa micekeroh i roma romi'adan, i fafaeday no cikiw a nanom macekel mapararoyay, makahacecayay a nanom manga'ay pakonira sa a malalinah.
S.PHON: nano~u~um nano~u~um(nano~um) ħananaj i ʦaaj kasasawaɬ~ɮən to~u~u rəmirəmiaɬ~ɮ ano~u~u a waaj ko~u~u nano~u~um i ʦaaj ka kapaħ ko~u~unipaɾo~u~umaan no~u~u mawmaħaj ʦaaj ko~u~u sasawaɬ~ɮən no~u~umao~u~uɬ~ɮipaj a maamaan i ni saŋan no~u~u wama i kakarajan araj ko~uɾijo~uɾ no~u nano~u~um nano~um nika ko~uɾijo~uɾ o~u nano~um i fafaəɬ~ɮ ato~u ɾaʡəno~u no~u ʦikiw maɾaɾinaɾinaħ. kaɾaɾijo~uɾ no~u nano~um, pakajniən no~u nano~um maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, maɾo~uso~uʡaj, maɾaraħo~uɬ~ɮ masasiro~uma kaira i masasiro~umaaj a nijaro~uʡ. taɾaʦo~uwa miʦəkəro~uħ i ro~uma ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, i fafaəɬ~ɮaj no~u ʦikiw a nano~um maʦəkəɾ mapararo~ujaj, makaħaʦəʦajaj a nano~um maŋaʡaj pako~unira sa a maɾaɾinaħ.
S.FORM: Nanum Nanum(nanom) hananay i caay kasasawaden tu remiremiad anu a waay ku nanum i caay ka kapah kunipalumaan nu mawmahay caay ku sasawaden numaudipay a maamaan i ni sangan nu wama i kakarayan Aray koliyol no nanum Nanom nika koliyol o nanom i fafaed ato la'eno no cikiw malalinalinah. kalaliyol no nanom, pakaynien no nanom malalood, maloso'ay, malarahod masasiroma kaira i masasiromaay a niyaro'. Talacowa micekeroh i roma romi'adan, i fafaeday no cikiw a nanom macekel mapararoyay, makahacecayay a nanom manga'ay pakonira sa a malalinah.
S.PHON: nano~u~um nano~u~um(nano~um) ħananaj i ʦaaj kasasawaɬ~ɮən to~u~u rəmirəmiaɬ~ɮ ano~u~u a waaj ko~u~u nano~u~um i ʦaaj ka kapaħ ko~u~unipaɾo~u~umaan no~u~u mawmaħaj ʦaaj ko~u~u sasawaɬ~ɮən no~u~umao~u~uɬ~ɮipaj a maamaan i ni saŋan no~u~u wama i kakarajan araj ko~uɾijo~uɾ no~u nano~u~um nano~um nika ko~uɾijo~uɾ o~u nano~um i fafaəɬ~ɮ ato~u ɾaʡəno~u no~u ʦikiw maɾaɾinaɾinaħ. kaɾaɾijo~uɾ no~u nano~um, pakajniən no~u nano~um maɾaɾo~uo~uɬ~ɮ, maɾo~uso~uʡaj, maɾaraħo~uɬ~ɮ masasiro~uma kaira i masasiro~umaaj a nijaro~uʡ. taɾaʦo~uwa miʦəkəro~uħ i ro~uma ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮan, i fafaəɬ~ɮaj no~u ʦikiw a nano~um maʦəkəɾ mapararo~ujaj, makaħaʦəʦajaj a nano~um maŋaʡaj pako~unira sa a maɾaɾinaħ.
